ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_data" (
  "hospitalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., state or city) */,
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for age range */,
  "cumulative_children_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Cumulative hospitalizations for children in the specified age range */,
  "cumulative_total_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total cumulative hospitalizations across all ages */,
  "percent_children_of_total" REAL /* Percentage of child hospitalizations relative to total hospitalizations */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate for children in percentage */,
  "date_of_record" TEXT /* Date when the hospitalization data was recorded */,
  "cause_of_hospitalization" TEXT /* Cause of hospitalization */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "child_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child */,
  "child_ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the child */,
  "child_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the child's residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospitalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES hospital_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_data_age_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_range_id") REFERENCES age_ranges ("age_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (city or region) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the location is found */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code(s) associated with the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_ranges" (
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for age range */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Description of the age range (e.g., 0-17, 0-19) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group category (e.g., all ages, children) */,
  "total_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations for the age group */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the age group */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Calculated hospitalization rate for the age group */,
  "date_of_record" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "cause_of_hospitalization" TEXT /* Common cause of hospitalization for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_statistics_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_ranges ("age_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES hospital_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_on" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES hospital_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., CDC, state health department) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being assessed */,
  "assessed_on" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "data_accuracy" REAL /* Percentage indicating data accuracy */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the assessment */,
  "assessed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality assessment */,
  "data_completeness" REAL /* Percentage of data completeness */,
  "data_timeliness" REAL /* Timeliness of the data */,
  "data_consistency" REAL /* Consistency of the data */,
  "data_validity" REAL /* Validity of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("assessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES hospital_data_sources ("source_id")
)
